data.Modification: Loss of C-terminal K from Heavy Chain of MAb/Deletion of K
Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G
Loss of arginine due to transpeptidation/Deletion of R
Cleavage product of EGS protein crosslinks by hydroylamine treatment/Addition of D

project.title: Structure and Function of GLR3.4
project.projectDescription: To confirm the presence of GSH as a posttranslational modification at a certain site of GLR3.4 protein
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Standard in solution digestion with TCEP/CAA and Urea followed by SDB-RPS desalting
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The raw data were analyzed with pFind with standard settings and GSH as a dynamic mod on Cysteines

references.referenceLine: Green MN, Gangwar SP, Michard E, Simon AA, Portes MT, Barbosa-Caro J, Wudick MM, Lizzio MA, Klykov O, Yelshanskaya MV, Feijó JA, Sobolevsky AI. Structure of the Arabidopsis thaliana glutamate receptor-like channel GLR3.4. Mol Cell. 2021 81(15):3216-3226.e8

Comment[Instrument]: Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific)
Comment[Separation]: EASY-Spray PepMap RSLC C18 50 cm × 75 μm column (Thermo Scientific)
Comment[AcquisitionMethod]: The instrument was set to run in top speed mode with 3 s cycles for the survey and the MS/MS scans.
